neuro_concentrate.summary: Vault Steward Archived Run `vault-steward-1773020624098` preserves the completed queue history, job set, and operational context that were rotated out of the active queue when the runtime moved to a current-only posture. It keeps the full completed run available for audit, lineage review, and maintenance retrospection while letting the active operational capsules stay focused on live work instead of stale completed state. The archived atom therefore carries history, not current execution intent.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Preserved completed Vault Steward queue history in an archived run atom before truncating the active queue.
